children.name: mj-text
children.text_content: Now Live: The KASK Protone Icon by MAAP. In exclusive shades of Opal and Loam, every detail is fine-tuned by KASK to extract every ounce of performance with advanced protection, ventilation, and aerodynamics to form new aesthetic expressions of the helmet favoured by riders around the world.

children.text_content: MAAP x KASK Protone Icon Loam

children.text_content: MAAP x KASK Protone Icon Opal
